logger.doc:name: Sent params
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: vars.userId, activityType: vars.queryParams.activityType, metricType: vars.queryParams.metricType, stage: vars.queryParams.sleep_stage, startDate: vars.queryParams.startDate, endDate: vars.queryParams.endDate } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO","Querying wearable data",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT user_id, metric_type, value, unit, source_device, recorded_at, duration_seconds FROM point_metrics WHERE user_id = :user_id"
var sanitizedMetricTypes= if(vars.queryParams.metricType != null ) vars.queryParams.metricType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var metricTypeClause= if (sanitizedMetricTypes != null) " AND metric_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedMetricTypes map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var dateClause = if (vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate != null) " AND recorded_at BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate" else "" var endClause = " ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset" --- baseSQL ++ metricTypeClause ++ dateClause ++ endClause

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT user_id, stage, start_time, end_time,duration_seconds,source_device FROM sleep_sessions WHERE user_id = :user_id"
var sanitizedSleepStages= if(vars.queryParams.sleep_stage != null ) vars.queryParams.sleep_stage map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var sleepStageClause= if (sanitizedSleepStages != null) " AND stage IN (" ++ (sanitizedSleepStages map ("'" ++ lower($) ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var dateClause = if (vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate != null) " AND start_time BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate" else ""
var endClause = " ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset" --- baseSQL ++ sleepStageClause ++ dateClause ++ endClause

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.activity_type, w.start_time, w.end_time, w.source_device, w.duration, w.duration_unit, w.energy_burned, ws.metric_type as stat_metric_type, ws.unit as stat_unit, ws.sum_value, ws.average_value, ws.minimum_value, ws.maximum_value FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_statistics ws ON ws.workout_id = w.id WHERE w.user_id = :user_id"
var sanitizedactivityType= if(vars.queryParams.activityType != null ) vars.queryParams.activityType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var activityTypeClause= if (sanitizedactivityType != null) " AND activity_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedactivityType map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else "" var dateClause = if (vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate != null) " AND w.start_time BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate" else "" var endClause = " ORDER BY w.start_time DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset" --- baseSQL ++ activityTypeClause ++ dateClause ++ endClause

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload groupBy ((item) -> item.id) pluck ((rows, workoutId) -> { user_id: rows[0].user_id, activity_type: rows[0].activity_type, start_time: rows[0].start_time, end_time: rows[0].end_time, source_device: rows[0].source_device, duration: rows[0].duration, duration_unit: rows[0].duration_unit, energy_burned: rows[0].energy_burned, statistics: rows filter ((row) -> row.stat_metric_type != null) map ((row) -> { metric_type: row.stat_metric_type, unit: row.stat_unit, sum_value: row.sum_value, average_value: row.average_value, minimum_value: row.minimum_value, maximum_value: row.maximum_value }) })
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT user_id, metric_type, value, unit, source_device, recorded_at, duration_seconds FROM point_metrics WHERE user_id = :user_id"
var sanitizedMetricTypes= if(vars.queryParams.metricType != null ) vars.queryParams.metricType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var metricTypeClause= if (sanitizedMetricTypes != null) " AND metric_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedMetricTypes map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var dateClause = if (vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate != null) " AND recorded_at BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate" else "" var endClause = " ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset" --- baseSQL ++ metricTypeClause ++ dateClause ++ endClause

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT user_id, stage, start_time, end_time,duration_seconds,source_device FROM sleep_sessions WHERE user_id = :user_id"
var sanitizedSleepStages= if(vars.queryParams.sleep_stage != null ) vars.queryParams.sleep_stage map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var sleepStageClause= if (sanitizedSleepStages != null) " AND stage IN (" ++ (sanitizedSleepStages map ("'" ++ lower($) ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var dateClause = if (vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate != null) " AND start_time BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate" else "" var endClause = " ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset" --- baseSQL ++ sleepStageClause ++ dateClause ++ endClause

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.activity_type, w.start_time, w.end_time, w.source_device, w.duration, w.duration_unit, w.energy_burned, ws.metric_type as stat_metric_type, ws.unit as stat_unit, ws.sum_value, ws.average_value, ws.minimum_value, ws.maximum_value FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_statistics ws ON ws.workout_id = w.id WHERE w.user_id = :user_id"
var sanitizedactivityType= if(vars.queryParams.activityType != null ) vars.queryParams.activityType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var activityTypeClause= if (sanitizedactivityType != null) " AND activity_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedactivityType map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else "" var dateClause = if (vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate != null) " AND w.start_time BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate" else "" var endClause = " ORDER BY w.start_time DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset" --- baseSQL ++ activityTypeClause ++ dateClause ++ endClause

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var point_metrics = "point_metrics": vars.pointMetricsResult var sleep_sessions = "sleep_sessions": vars.sleepSessionsResult var workouts = "workouts": vars.workOutsResult groupBy ((item, index) -> item.id) pluck ((rows,workoutId) ->{ user_id: rows[0].user_id, activity_type: rows[0].activity_type, start_time: rows[0].start_time, end_time: rows[0].end_time, source_device: rows[0].source_device, duration: rows[0].duration, duration_unit: rows[0].duration_unit, energy_burned: rows[0].energy_burned, statistics: rows filter ((row) -> row.stat_metric_type !=null ) map ((row) ->{ metric_type: row.stat_metric_type, unit: row.stat_unit, sum_value: row.sum_value, average_value: row.average_value, minimum_value: row.minimum_value, maximum_value: row.maximum_value } ) } ) --- point_metrics ++ sleep_sessions ++ workouts
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","An Error Occured",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-500", message: "Server Currently Unavailable", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
